cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The user has a table of penguins with their names, ages, heights, and weights. They deleted Bernard and now want to know how many penguins are less than 10 years old. First, I need to list out the original data. The penguins are Louis (7), Bernard (5), Vincent (9), and Gwen (8). Then Bernard is removed. So after deleting Bernard, the remaining penguins are Louis, Vincent, and Gwen. Their ages are 7, 9, and 8 respectively. All of these are less than 10. Wait, that's three penguins. But let me check again. Louis is 7, which is under 10. Vincent is 9, also under. Gwen is 8. So that's three. The options are (C) 3. But wait, let me make sure I didn't miss anything.
